description_long: This helmet features a rounded, dome-shaped metallic shell with a prominent central ridge running from front to back, reminiscent of historical or medieval designs. The exterior is primarily a dark, glossy metal, accented by a brownish band encircling the lower edge, which appears to be reinforced with rivets or studs. The front of the helmet has a pronounced nose guard extending downward, flanked by two cheek guards that curve outward, providing facial protection. The rear of the helmet is smooth and rounded, offering full cranial coverage. There are no visible ventilation holes, visors, or graphic designs on the surface, giving it a utilitarian and robust appearance. The interior is not visible, but it is likely lined with padding for comfort and fit.
description: A dark, glossy metal helmet with a central ridge, nose guard, and cheek guards, accented by a brown band with rivets. The design is robust and plain, with no visible graphics or vents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the central ridge, nose guard, and both cheek guards clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the rounded dome, the brown band with rivets, and the profile of the cheek guard.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, rounded back of the helmet and the encircling brown band.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the dome, brown band, and cheek guard from the other side.
